name: Fujifilm XF 8mm f/3.5 R WR
description: Offering a wide field of view with minimal distortion, the XF 8mm f/3.5 R WR Lens from FUJIFILM expands the creative possibilities of the ultra-wide-angle image for photographers and content. This lens, equivalent to 12mm in full-frame format, provides an angle of view greater than 120°, allowing users to capture subjects and backgrounds in remarkable detail. Engineered to work with the latest 40-megapixel X-Trans sensors, the ultra-wide focal length delivers sharpness across the frame with the aid of two extra-low dispersion and three aspherical elements to suppress lens aberrations.

features.General Features: APS-C Format | Aperture Range F3.5 - F22 | Angle of view 121° | Focal Length 8mm | 12mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | Lightweight Ultra-Wide Angle | Aspherical and Low Dispersion Elements | Filter size Ø62mm | 1x Fujifilm XF 8mm f/3.5 R WR Lens | 1x Front lens cap FLCP-62 II | 1x Rear lens cap RLCP-001 | 1x Lens hood | 1x Lens wrapping cloth | 1x Manual Book | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi Fujifilm Indonesia
